title: How to Collab on YouTube So Your Video Shows on Both Channels
description:
Here's how to upload a collab video on YouTube so it shows up on both channels and reaches both audiences.

Upload in YouTube Studio the same way you normally would — hit Create, upload your file, and fill in your title and description. Before you publish, scroll down in the Details section and click Show More. Find the Collaboration option, click Invite a Collaborator, and send your collaborator the invite link.

Once they accept, their channel name and a Subscribe button appear right below your video. The video then gets pushed into their subscribers' feeds too — not just yours — which means double the reach from a single upload.

✅ Works for regular videos and YouTube Shorts
✅ Supports up to 5 collaborators per video
✅ No separate upload needed on their end

🔔 Subscribe for more tips on growing your YouTube channel.

---

#YouTubeCollab #YouTubeCollaboration #GrowYourChannel #YouTubeStudio #YouTubeTips
